scripts.mvp:generic: pnpm validate:model config/models/fulfillment-center-mvp.json && pnpm run:model config/models/fulfillment-center-mvp.json baseline && pnpm run:experiment config/models/fulfillment-center-mvp.json baseline && pnpm run:sweep config/models/fulfillment-center-mvp.json throughput-sweep && pnpm report:model output/fulfillment-center-mvp-throughput-sweep-sweep.json
scripts.build: pnpm run generate:schema && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter viewer build
